items.name: Studio Admin Next.js Shadcn Dashboard
best_fit_use_cases: kanban, tasks, invoices, calendar, chat, and email interfaces
items.skill_usage_notes: Use as a concrete MIT-licensed reference for modern Next.js 16 admin shells with collapsible sidebars, variable content widths, light/dark and multi-preset themes, TanStack Table data grids, React Hook Form and Zod forms, Zustand state, multi-dashboard routing, users and roles pages, authentication screens, and operational pages such as infrastructure, email, invoices, tasks, kanban, and calendars. Retain the MIT copyright and license notice when reusing substantial code.

evidence.free_public: The public repository can be cloned and run locally without login, subscription, trial, or marketplace access.
evidence.license: The repository LICENSE contains the MIT License and permits use, copying, modification, distribution, sublicensing, and sale with notice retention.
evidence.stack: The README identifies Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui, Zod, React Hook Form, Zustand, TanStack Table, Biome, and Husky.
evidence.screens: The README lists default, CRM, finance, analytics, productivity, ecommerce, academy, logistics, and infrastructure dashboards plus chat, email, users, roles, kanban, tasks, invoices, calendar, and four authentication screens.
